ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agent */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the agent was created */,
  "agent_version" TEXT /* Version of the agent */,
  "agent_type" TEXT /* Type of the agent (e.g., mobile, stationary) */,
  "agent_status" TEXT /* Status of the agent (e.g., active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the agent was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the environment was created */,
  "environment_version" TEXT /* Version of the environment */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of the environment (e.g., simulation, real-world) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the environment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the algorithm was created */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_type" TEXT /* Type of the algorithm (e.g., model-free, model-based) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the algorithm was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent used in the experiment */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment used in the experiment */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used in the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "experiment_version" TEXT /* Version of the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the episode belongs to */,
  "timestep" INTEGER /* Timestep of the episode */,
  "reward" REAL /* Reward received in the episode */,
  "done" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the episode is done */,
  "episode_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the episode */,
  "episode_status" TEXT /* Status of the episode (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the episode was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the action belongs to */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the agent */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., movement, interaction) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the observation belongs to */,
  "observation" TEXT /* Observation made by the agent */,
  "observation_type" TEXT /* Type of the observation (e.g., visual, sensory) */,
  "observation_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the reward belongs to */,
  "reward" REAL /* Reward received by the agent */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of the reward (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the log */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time when the log was generated */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message in the log */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., info, error, warning) */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log (e.g., debug, info, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
